history.text: A county was established, creating an early political base for later state development.
Battle of São Mamede became a defining conflict in Portugal's political story.
Battle of Ourique became a defining conflict in Portugal's political story.
Conference of Zamora helped define Portugal's political status.
Papal recognition strengthened Portugal's medieval legitimacy.
Restoration appears in Portugal's historical record.

Portugal became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
